instruction: Use VBA or remove only one instance of a value in the 'Amount' column and 'Flags' column, when the 'Amount' Column matches a value in the 'Result values' column, even if the matching value appears multiple times in the 'Amount' column. After the matching values are removed from the 'Amount' and 'Flags' columns, remove the resulting blank cells in the columns to shift all the remaining values together. The Computed total should be the sum of column A. Deviation is the difference between Computed total and Goal amount.
